versions.version_description: i found in the other versions some mistakes or there are some that are very diffuclt to understanding

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro] 
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch],   [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]...

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G2[/ch]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
  I will not make the same mistakes that you did[/tab]
[tab][ch]G2[/ch]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]  
  I will not let myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                 [ch]D[/ch]
Cause my heart so much misery[/tab]
[tab][ch]G2[/ch]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
  I will not break the way you did,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
You fell so hard[/tab]
[tab][ch]G2[/ch]                  [ch]Bm7[/ch]         
  I've learned the hard way[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  
To never let it get that far[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]      
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus[/ch]  
I never stray too far from the sidewalk[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D5[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]     
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Dsus[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]   
I learned to play on the safe side so I don't get hurt      [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]     
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G/B[/ch]       [ch]Dsus[/ch]                   [ch]B[/ch]                     
I find it hard to trust not only me, but everyone around me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] (or [ch]C[/ch])     
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dsus[/ch]
I am afraid[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G2[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch]
  I lose my way[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
And it's not too long before you point it out[/tab]
[tab][ch]G2[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
  I cannot cry[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
Because you know that's weakness in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]G2[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
  I'm forced to fake[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G2[/ch]
A smile, a laugh everyday of my life[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]
My heart can't possibly break[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
When it wasn't even whole to start with[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]      
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus[/ch]       
I never stray too far from the sidewalk[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D5[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]     
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Dsus[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]   
I learned to play on the safe side so I don't get hurt      [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]     
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G/B[/ch]       [ch]Dsus[/ch]                   [ch]B[/ch]                     
I find it hard to trust not only me, but everyone around me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] (or [ch]C[/ch])     
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dsus[/ch]
I am afraid[/tab]
            
[Bridge]
[tab]               [ch]Bm[/ch]      
I watched you die[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]   
I heard you cry every night in your sleep[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
I was so young[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
You should have known better than to lean on me[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
You never thought of anyone else[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dsus[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
You just saw your pain[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]      
And now I cry in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    
For the same damn thing[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus[/ch]               
I never stray too far from the sidewalk[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D5[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch] 
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Dsus[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      
I learned to play on the safe side so I don't get hurt[/tab]
(key change A, pause)           
[tab]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Esus[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]Esus[/ch]   
I try my hardest just to forget everything[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E5[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Esus[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]C#[/ch] 
I don't know how to let anyone else in[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch] 
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A/C#[/ch]              [ch]Esus[/ch]  [ch]C#[/ch]
I'm ashamed of my life because it's empty[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Esus[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
I am afraid[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Ooh, oohhh, ohhh[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m[/ch]   
Because of you [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]   
Ooh, oohhh, ohhh[/tab]
ooh
